coverage_summary: The improved test cases now cover all specified functional requirements, business rules, and validations. Email format validation (missing '@', domain, local part, spaces) and boundary tests for password length (7, 8, 9, 100 characters) have been added. Duplicate email case-insensitivity and special characters in email are also covered. However, gaps remain in password complexity, password confirmation, account verification, session management, and explicit error message validation.
remaining_gaps: No test cases for password complexity (uppercase, lowercase, numbers, special characters) - risk identified
No test cases for password confirmation/re-enter password field - missing information
No test cases for account verification process (e.g., email verification link) - missing information
No test cases for session management after account creation (e.g., auto-login) - missing information
No explicit test cases for error message content validation (e.g., exact wording for duplicate email, invalid password length) - missing information
recommendations: Add test cases for password complexity if requirements are clarified (e.g., must contain uppercase, lowercase, number, special character)
Add test cases for password confirmation field (matching and mismatching passwords)
Add test cases for account verification process (email verification link)
Add test cases for session management after account creation (auto-login or redirect)
Add explicit test cases to validate exact error messages for duplicate email, invalid password length, and invalid email format
Consider adding test cases for SQL injection or XSS in email/password fields to enhance security coverage
